textByHash.213872dc8ada6263f2499bab41f4b34df1e9c70b: Look around and you'll see a selection of dice. What I will do is call out a number. You must then roll over the dice to get the top faces adding up to create that number. For example. If I said '15', you'd have to turn
textByHash.42ac979ef26a6105147f256f62ebbe466b26ff4d: What lucky question will I get?
textByHash.42b2cfede7a96c5b962e448c66aa4debf3c466bf: Let's have a game! It's a game of luck! Or is it...
textByHash.882acef1bb5582272dfc5b3d40304f8ef4aca992: Well Done! The next number is:
textByHash.95f4150f3c502bfb1ad888c62f5f9c8286ee2088: Look around and you'll see a selection of dice. I will call out a number. You must then roll over the dice to get the top faces adding up to create that number. For example. If I said '15', you'd have to turn over the dice
textByHash.9873e1bea6413a83dcc2915064e3db69df1f498c: You've done it! Good work. Remember: It is important to respect that luck plays a part in things, but that doesn't mean there is not reason and logic behind your surroundings. If you look hard enough you can see the
textByHash.d6eeeb9946a6efd3cc3164646b60eb667b199747: to get the following numbers at the top: 6 + 4 + 2 + 1 + 1 + 1 = 15. There are of course many ways to get the number 15, but the dice are perhaps not all that random!
textByHash.ecef74f7d67dd501497246d98355418921b777c0: over the dice to get the following numbers at the top: 6 + 4 + 2 + 1 + 1 + 1 = 15. There are of course many ways to get the number 15, but the dice are perhaps not all that random!
